description: A seller has decided not to sell their home and wants to cancel the listing agreement.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the seller's request and review the cancellation clause in the signed listing agreement.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent reviews the contract for any terms related to early cancellation.

nodes.task_description: Generate the official listing cancellation form.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates the correct legal form for cancellation.

nodes.task_description: Send the cancellation form to the seller for signature and then update the listing status in the MLS to 'Cancelled'.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent completes the cancellation process and updates the MLS.
